features: SAY GOODBYE TO ODOUR AND WELCOME LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS, Enjoy 48HR freshness and smelltastic confidence with the Old Spice deodorant stick, powered by odor-fighting technology and a long-lasting perfume quality scent
TRY THE PERFUME QUALITY SCENT OF ORIGINAL and step into classic greatness, This rich fragrance of cinnamon, vanilla and spicy citrus is like a time machine to everlasting freshness

UNLEASH THE POWER OF INVISIBLE FRESHNESS, The Old Spice stick deodorant for men is like a ninja of freshness: it keeps you smelling great all day, while leaving no visible trace on your white or black clothing
DEODORANT FORMULATED WITH 0% ALUMINIUM SALTS, With this aluminium free deodorant, you can impress purely with your personality and our legendary perfume quality scents

TRY STICK DEODORANT FOR STRONG UNDER-ARM ODOUR PROTECTION, Thank to its direct application on skin, stick is the right tool for strong odour protection, with a dry and easy application, Odour does not stand a chance (vs Old Spice Body Spray deodorant)
description: Product Description Enjoy 48H freshness and smelltastic confidence with Old Spice Captain aluminium free deodorant stick for men. Thanks to its odour-fighting and perfume quality scents, it overpowers even the burliest stink with overwhelming good-smellingness, providing odour protection that is invisible on black and white clothes. And with this level of worry-free freshness, you can focus on higher pursuits like closing deals or teaching dolphins to speak. TRY THE PERFUME QUALITY SCENT OF ORIGINAL and step into classic greatness This rich fragrance of cinnamon, vanilla and spicy citrus is like a time machine to everlasting freshness. Ingredients Old Spice High Endurance Original Deodorant Stick contains:Dipropylene Glycol , Water , Propylene Glycol , Sodium Stearate , Fragrance , PPG-3 Myristyl Ether , Tetrasodium EDTA , Violet 2 , Green 6.
